title: pseuderanthemum fruticosum
intro: Pseuderanthemum fruticosum, also known as the 'false arnish', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pseuderanthemum fruticosum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
